meaning: n.制带的材料,带类,[机械]调带装置
examples: A truck came belting up behind us.
She came belting out of the woods.
They went belting along the road.
But these days, audiences seem to think it's weird for a character to walk down the street, belting lyrics.
Less well known is that he has a lovely singing voice and can be heard belting out French folk songs on occasion.
